Class FilesContextActionLogic

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.nb.annotation.FilesContextActionLogic
public class FilesContextActionLogic extends Object
Logic handler for adding NetBeans files and folders to the V2 AI context.

This class bridges the IDE's FileObject selections with the ResourceManager. It handles recursion for folders and provides a V1-compatible API for seamless migration.

Author:
anahata

  • Constructor Details

    • FilesContextActionLogic

      public FilesContextActionLogic()

  • Method Details

    • addRecursively

      public static void addRecursively(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo, Agi targetAgi, boolean recursive)
      Adds a file or folder's contents to the specified agi context recursively.
      Parameters:
      fo - The starting FileObject.
      targetAgi - The target agi session.
      recursive - True to traverse subfolders.

    • collectAdditions

      private static void collectAdditions(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo, Agi targetAgi, boolean recursive, List<Path> toRegister, Set<org.openide.filesystems.FileObject> fosToRefresh)
      Recursively collects files that need to be added to the context.
      Parameters:
      fo - The current file or folder.
      targetAgi - The target session.
      recursive - Whether to recurse into subfolders.
      toRegister - Output list of paths to register.
      fosToRefresh - Output set of file objects to refresh.

    • removeRecursively

      public static void removeRecursively(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo, Agi targetAgi, boolean recursive)
      Removes a file or folder's contents from the specified V2 context.
      Parameters:
      fo - The file object to remove.
      targetAgi - The target agi session.
      recursive - Whether to remove subfolders recursively.

    • collectRemovals

      private static void collectRemovals(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo, Agi targetAgi, boolean recursive, List<String> ids, Set<org.openide.filesystems.FileObject> fos)
      Recursively collects resource IDs that need to be removed from the context.
      Parameters:
      fo - The current file or folder.
      targetAgi - The target session.
      recursive - Whether to recurse into subfolders.
      ids - Output list of resource IDs to unregister.
      fos - Output set of file objects to refresh.

    • isInContext

      public static boolean isInContext(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo, Agi agi)
      Checks if a specific file is currently present in a session's V2 context.
      Parameters:
      fo - The file to check.
      agi - The session to query.
      Returns:
      true if the file is in context.

    • countAgisInContext

      public static int countAgisInContext(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo)
      Counts how many logically open sessions contain the specified file in their V2 context.
      Parameters:
      fo - The file to check.
      Returns:
      The number of open sessions containing the file.

    • getSessionFileCounts

      public static Map<Agi,Integer> getSessionFileCounts(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo, boolean recursive)
      Returns V2 resource counts for each open session within a folder or package.
      Parameters:
      fo - The container to scan.
      recursive - Whether to count recursively.
      Returns:
      A map of open sessions to their respective resource counts.

    • countFilesInContext

      private static int countFilesInContext(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo, Agi agi, boolean recursive)
      Internal counter for files belonging to a folder that are in context.
      Parameters:
      fo - The folder or file to check.
      agi - The session to query.
      recursive - Whether to perform a recursive count.
      Returns:
      The number of resources in context.

    • fireBatchRefreshRecursive

      private static void fireBatchRefreshRecursive(Set<org.openide.filesystems.FileObject> targets)
      Fires a batch refresh event for a set of file objects, including their parent hierarchy.
      Parameters:
      targets - The set of file objects to refresh.

    • fireRefreshRecursive

      public static void fireRefreshRecursive(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo)
      Fires a recursive refresh event for a single file object and its parents.
      Parameters:
      fo - The file object to refresh.
